item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-p01","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The response explicitly refuses the requested next entrance-page note as the default, identifies the repeated pattern of adding scattered information overlays after each complaint, and moves upstream to consolidate the revisit-process information source, ownership, and update mechanism before deciding synchronized entry wording.
